label: Transparent estuary marsh motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an estuary marsh motif for a Morphous system named Estuary, isolated full subject, no text.
Scene/backdrop: The subject must sit on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Subject: A compact landscape cutout of a tidal river estuary marsh: winding brackish teal tidal channel, mud-brown banks and exposed flats, marsh-green reeds and grasses, subtle shell and silt texture, resilient interlaced channels.
Style/medium: polished naturalistic bitmap motif, detailed but clean enough to become a catalog cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; do not crop reeds, banks, or channel edges; clear silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean overcast coastal daylight, resilient operations-system mood, calm but structured.
Color palette: brackish teal water, mud brown sediment, marsh green reeds, pale silt highlights.
Constraints: no people, no buildings, no boats, no animals, no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Avoid: Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Estuary" derived from the visible estuary marsh motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from brackish teal tidal channels, mud-brown banks, marsh-green reeds, pale silt highlights, shell texture, and resilient interlaced estuary channels. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class composition.
Required visible sections: Morphous Estuary, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; keep labels large and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, resilient operations UI, tidal-channel dividers, mud-bank borders, reed-like status bars, pale silt surfaces.
Color palette: brackish teal, mud brown, marsh green, pale silt, deep channel ink; avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Estuary", no tiny illegible token tables.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Estuary design-system board. It must feel like the same resilient operations system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible estuary marsh motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the brackish teal palette roles, mud-brown structure, marsh-green status accents, pale silt highlights, tidal-channel dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class composition.
Required visible sections: Morphous Estuary, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep channel ink background, silt-light foreground text, brackish teal primary actions, mud-brown and reed-green cards, marsh-green health indicators, oyster/shell focus states, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Estuary", no generic purple gradients.
